adjudications.rule_text: For completed captured binary votes, compare YES and NO PVP and preserve abstentions as non-decisive.
adjudications.scope: Repository interpretation of completed captured binary proposal results.
adjudications.source_native_gap: Captured PIP-1 text contains historical quorum language but no numeric quorum threshold.
adjudications.adjudication_source: Repository owner approval review for draft PR #17
